meta.book: Actual path-tagged staked (v8_hcStakeTier in SUPER/TOP/MINI/RANK/SHARP/…), odds-capped units, June1+
meta.note: CLV metrics are causal as-of (wallet profile before that date). Counterfactual = cut stake to 0 when fail gate; no reallocation.

S3_nHighPct_ge2.name: Keep only if ≥2 FOR wallets with % +CLV ≥ 60

S4_nElite_ge2.name: Keep only if ≥2 elite FOR (%≥55 & meanCLV≥1)

S6_pctEdge_ge0_whenOpposed.name: Cut opposed when pctEdge < 0; keep unopposed

S7_A_only_meanPct60.name: Path A only: require meanPct≥60; B/C/D unchanged

S8_combo_A60_or_elite2.name: Path A: meanPct≥60; else ≥2 elite (B/C gate)
